narrative_beat: A promessa transhumanista — o corpo humano redesenhado pela máquina, sereno na aparência mas morto por dentro, o Nefilim do século 21

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

shot.camera_angle: eye-level, slight 3/4 angle showing spine and arms
shot.depth_of_field: torso in focus, background laboratory blurred

subject.primary: human figure from waist up, back partially visible, spine replaced by glowing golden circuit-board column visible through translucent skin
subject.focal_point: the golden circuit-board spine column and the joints where arms meet mechanical shoulders
subject.secondary: both arms replaced by articulated golden mechanical limbs with visible servo joints and hydraulic elements
props: golden circuit-board spine column glowing through translucent back skin
articulated golden mechanical arms from shoulders down
face half human skin half chrome — neutral serene but empty expression
floating orange embers around the mechanical joints

environment.location: transhumanist research laboratory with clinical equipment
environment.time_of_day: interior laboratory lighting, sterile and cold
environment.atmosphere: the promised upgrade that costs your humanity — serene on the surface, hollow within

composition.rule: rule of thirds — figure centered, spine column as vertical axis, Ken Burns slow rotation around figure from back toward front
composition.foreground: transhumanist figure in warm golden tones, circuit spine and mechanical arms prominent
composition.background: desaturated black-and-white laboratory environment — clinical equipment, monitoring stations, sterile white walls stripped of color

lighting.key_light: warm amber key light from left side illuminating the human skin portions
lighting.fill_light: golden glow from circuit-board spine providing interior fill from behind
lighting.rim_light: thin crimson rim tracing the edges of mechanical arms where they connect to human shoulder tissue
lighting.mood: the uncanny peace of the post-human, a serenity that costs everything

style.post_processing: halation, crushed blacks, amber highlights, anamorphic lens flares
style.texture_detail: 35mm film grain, dust particles, floating orange embers

mood.emotion: cold serenity masking emptiness — the transhumanist promise as spiritual death

symbolism.primary: the circuit-board spine replacing the biological one represents the transhumanist agenda to rewrite human DNA with machine logic
symbolism.secondary: the serene-but-dead expression connects the transhumanist body to the Nephilim — different in nature from true humanity

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
photorealistic documentary cinematography, not illustrated or cartoon
analog film photography aesthetic, no digital art flatness
muted desaturated background palette, warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
